title: segmentation fault in mserver5 process
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_identity (id INTEGER IDENTITY, name VARCHAR(50), value INTEGER CHECK (value >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_identity (name, value) VALUES ('Test1', 10), ('Test2', NULL), ('Test3', -5);
SELECT id, name, value, CASE WHEN id > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_positive FROM test_identity;
CREATE TABLE related_data (rid INTEGER IDENTITY, test_id INTEGER REFERENCES test_identity(id), description TEXT);
INSERT INTO related_data (test_id, description) SELECT id, CONCAT('Description ', id) FROM test_identity WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: selecting from table with identity column
